identity.description: Single-node Proxmox homelab with repository-managed agentic operations automation.

available_workflows.description: Converge the OpenBao Agent runtime-secret injection path across the migrated docker-runtime-lv3 platform applications and verify that the services now consume `/run/lv3-secrets/<service>/runtime.env` instead of compose-directory `.env` files.
Run the ADR 0141 token inventory audit against the canonical token policy and emit a receipt plus ledger event.
Render the repository-managed capacity model report, combining committed allocations, planned growth, and optional live metrics from the monitoring VM.
Run the ADR 0071 observation loop checks and emit structured findings from the controller command lane.
Close one ADR 0080 maintenance window and emit the matching platform.maintenance.closed or platform.maintenance.force_closed event.
Build the lv3.platform Ansible collection, validate the local tarball path, and publish it to the configured internal Galaxy server.
Converge the dedicated backup VM, host-side PBS integration, and the optional ADR 0100 off-site copy of backup-lv3.
Publish repo-managed public hostnames at the NGINX edge.
Converge public ingress forwarding from the host to the NGINX edge VM.
Converge the host bridge and NAT network model for guest connectivity.
Converge host Tailscale installation and subnet-router settings.
Run the ADR 0091 multi-source drift suite through the build server and publish structured drift events plus a stored receipt.
Converge the unified platform API gateway on docker-runtime-lv3 and publish it at api.lv3.org through the shared NGINX edge.
Converge scheduled control-plane backups on docker-runtime-lv3, stage controller recovery references, validate recurring restore drills on backup-lv3, and publish a verified off-host witness bundle.
Converge the Docker runtime baseline on docker-runtime-lv3.
Deploy the Dozzle hub on docker-runtime-lv3, join remote log agents from docker-build-lv3 and monitoring-lv3, and publish logs.lv3.org through the shared authenticated edge.
Converge private Gitea on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, and register the self-hosted Actions runner on docker-build-lv3.
Converge the default-deny guest network policy on the Proxmox host and all managed guests.
Deploy the repo-managed Headscale control plane on the Proxmox host, publish it through the shared NGINX edge, and reconcile the public DNS record for headscale.lv3.org.
Deploy the Homepage unified service dashboard on docker-runtime-lv3 and publish it at home.lv3.org through the shared authenticated edge.
Converge Keycloak on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish it at sso.lv3.org, and wire Grafana through the shared SSO broker.
Converge Langfuse on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish it at langfuse.lv3.org, and verify repo-managed trace ingestion.
Converge the Dockerized mail platform, host SMTP ingress, DNS, sender profiles, Grafana mail telemetry, and mail-gateway trace export.

Converge Mattermost on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host, and seed the repo-managed collaboration channels and incoming webhooks.
Converge the monitoring VM, guest telemetry paths, Grafana dashboards, Prometheus service-graph metrics, Tempo tracing, and centralized Loki log shipping.
Converge n8n on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, and publish it at n8n.lv3.org with a protected editor path and public webhook ingress.
Converge private NetBox on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish the host-side Tailscale proxy, and synchronize canonical repo inventory into the API.
Deploy the private ntfy paging gateway on docker-runtime-lv3 and persist the repo-managed credential used by Alertmanager critical routing.
Converge host-local ntopng capture on the Proxmox bridges and expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy path.
Deploy the private Ollama runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, sync the repo-managed startup model catalog, and verify local inference health.
Deploy private Open WebUI on docker-runtime-lv3 with repo-managed bootstrap auth and an operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.
Deploy private OpenBao on docker-runtime-lv3, seed scoped secrets, configure Transit, and enable PostgreSQL dynamic credentials.
Converge the private Portainer runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, publish it through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and persist the controller-local bootstrap auth.
Converge the dedicated PostgreSQL guest baseline on postgres-lv3.
Deploy the private platform context API with Qdrant on docker-runtime-lv3, publish it through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and seed the initial retrieval corpus.
Deploy the private SearXNG runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, publish its tailnet-only hostname through the Proxmox host proxy, and re-render Open WebUI to use the local search endpoint.

Converge the private Semaphore runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, publish the Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host, and seed the self-test project plus controller-local auth artifacts.
Deploy the private step-ca runtime, expose it over the host Tailscale path, and enable SSH CA trust on the Proxmox host and managed guests.
Converge private Vaultwarden on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend, publish the Tailscale-only HTTPS hostname, and persist the controller-local bootstrap admin artifacts.
Converge Windmill on docker-runtime-lv3, provision its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, and expose the operator-only Tailscale proxy on the Proxmox host.
Publish the private database.lv3.org DNS record toward the Patroni-managed PostgreSQL VIP.
Validate a staged service change, enforce the ADR 0073 promotion gate, and then apply the approved production promotion.
Deploy Uptime Kuma on the Docker runtime VM and publish it at uptime.lv3.org.
Render the ADR 0100 ordered recovery plan, current DR evidence summary, and table-top review state.
Sweep the governed ADR 0106 ephemeral VM pool, retag unowned temporary VMs with a one-hour grace period, and destroy expired VMs.
Run the ADR 0171 controlled fault-injection subset on docker-runtime-lv3, record a JSON report, and optionally publish failure notifications.
Destroy any ADR 0088 ephemeral fixture whose lifetime window has expired and record one reaper-run receipt for the scan.
Show the configured validation gate checks plus the last local, bypass, and post-merge results.
Regenerate the README status fragments that are derived from canonical repository state.
Converge the host access baseline for routine non-root operations.
Converge the Linux guest access baseline for the managed VM fleet.
Converge the Proxmox host security baseline including firewall, notifications, ACME, and TOTP.
Install the repo-managed pre-commit and pre-push hook layers for this checkout.
Install Proxmox VE on the Debian host from the repo-managed package path.
Execute one reviewed dependency-wave manifest so each wave acquires its locks up front and runs its playbooks in parallel.
Merge pending ADR 0158 staged config changes into the merge-eligible registry files and emit conflict or merged events for downstream consumers.
Run the ADR 0111 nightly integration suite, post the summary to Mattermost, and emit GlitchTip failures when checks regress.
Open one ADR 0080 maintenance window in the private NATS KV bucket before a planned live change.
Disable one ADR 0108 human operator across Keycloak, OpenBao, Tailscale, and the repo-authoritative roster while preserving audit history.
Apply one ADR 0108 human-operator onboarding change across the repo-authoritative roster, Keycloak, OpenBao, step-ca, Tailscale, and Mattermost.
Validate and rebuild the repo-managed Proxmox VM template catalog in dependency order, then refresh the template manifest metadata.
Run the ADR 0126 observation-to-action closure loop over one batch of observation findings and persist per-service loop runs.
Run governed Portainer API actions such as listing containers, reading logs, or restarting one container through the repo-managed wrapper.
Re-run the ADR 0087 validation manifest after merge to main from the Windmill worker checkout.
Run the ADR 0087 repository validation gate through the build server with local Docker fallback.
Create and verify the durable Proxmox API automation identity and token.
Provision the Debian cloud template and declared guest VMs on Proxmox.
Converge one catalogued lv3.org hostname through the Hetzner DNS role and, when applicable, refresh the shared NGINX edge publication.
Build the ADR 0108 quarterly access review summary and optionally post it to Mattermost.
Run the ADR 0099 backup-restore verification workflow, write one receipt, emit the mutation-audit event, and optionally publish NATS and Mattermost summaries.
Rotate one ADR 0141 governed Grafana service account token through the configured token hook contract.
Rotate one ADR 0141 governed Keycloak client secret through the configured token hook contract.
Rotate one ADR 0141 governed local platform CLI token through the configured token hook contract.
Plan or apply one repo-managed secret rotation, update the owning service without a full reconverge, and persist the rotated value in OpenBao.
Rotate one ADR 0141 governed Windmill API token through the configured token hook contract.
Run the ADR 0114 rule-based incident triage engine for one alert payload, write the report, and optionally post the summary to Mattermost.
Execute one structured runbook definition from YAML, JSON, or Markdown front matter, persist the step trace, and support resume after escalation.
Run one ADR 0172 watchdog pass over running mutation jobs, abort stale executions, and emit a heartbeat.
Run the ADR 0102 Lynis and Trivy security posture workflow, store a receipt, and publish security events.
Run governed Semaphore API actions such as listing projects, listing templates, launching the seeded self-test job, or reading one task output.
Run the ADR 0139 subdomain exposure registry audit, check live DNS and edge auth behavior, and store one receipt.
Reconcile the merged ADR 0108 operator roster into the live identity systems from the authoritative config/operators.yaml file.
Run the ADR 0141 exposure response workflow for one governed token, including revocation, replacement, incident receipt generation, and session invalidation when required.
Calibrate ADR 0114 rule precision and recall against resolved incident cases and publish the weekly summary.
Run repo-local Uptime Kuma client actions such as bootstrap, monitor reconciliation, status-page reconciliation, or maintenance inspection.
Run repo-local Uptime Robot automation for independent public status monitoring contacts and monitors.
Run the repository validation pipeline used before merge to main.
Generate the weekly Windmill payload used to post the current platform capacity summary to Mattermost.
Run the ADR 0142 public-surface security scan, store a receipt, and publish high or critical findings.

registered.description: Scheduled observation loop that collects repo-managed findings and drift evidence.
Governed Proxmox API mutation identity for repo-managed automation.
Alert-driven triage workflow that proposes the cheapest safe next action.

recent_changes.summary: completed the first live staging activation for ADR 0183 by applying the staging VMs on `vmbr20`, recording the staging live-apply receipt, and codifying `network_firewall = false` for staged VM NICs until staged guest-network-policy automation exists

agentic_architecture.overview: Intent-driven repository automation with validation, approval, release metadata, and runtime convergence routed through governed workflows.
pipeline: Live apply receipts and deployment history (ADR 0036 / ADR 0081)

known_gaps.title: NATS JetStream For Internal Event Bus And Agent Coordination
GlitchTip For Application Exceptions And Task Failures
Auxiliary Cloud Failure Domain for Witness, Recovery, and Burst Capacity
Prewarmed Fixture Pools and Lease-Based Ephemeral Capacity
Anonymized Seed Data Snapshots for Repeatable Tests
Failover Rehearsal Gate for Redundancy Tiers
Network Impairment Test Matrix for Staging and Previews
Synthetic Transaction Replay for Capacity and Recovery Validation
Immutable Guest Replacement for Stateful and Edge Services
Separate Capacity Classes for Standby, Recovery, and Preview Workloads
